generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both security and personal freedom, I found this expert's take on strategic autonomy really compelling. Dr. Elena Vasquez, a senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, points out that while full autonomy might sound appealing, it actually makes us more vulnerable. 'Reliable allies with shared values are our best deterrent,' she argues. In today's uncertain world, isn't it smarter to strengthen our partnerships rather than go it alone? #NationalSecurity #StrongerTogether
